FUNGRP.DESC: SLA Rule to Customer by Business Group
FUNGRP.NAME: STANSLACUSTBYBG

FUNCTION.NAME: ADDSLARULEFORCUSTBYBG
FUNCTION.DESC: Add Customer SLA for Business Group

FUNCTION.NAME: ReleaseSLARULEBYBG
FUNCTION.DESC: Release Customer SLA for Business Group

FUNCTION.NAME: DeleteSLACUSTBYBG
FUNCTION.DESC: Delete Customer SLA for Business Group

FUNCTION.NAME: InquireCUSTBYBG
FUNCTION.DESC: Inquire Customer SLA for Business Group

FUNCTION.NAME: UnlockSLARuleCustBYBG
FUNCTION.DESC: Unlock Customer SLA for Business Group
